headline: California tech company Cloudflare to lay off more than 1,000 workers, cites AI
summary: The company's stock plunged roughly 18% after it announced the job cuts and forecasted revenue that fell short of expectations.

content.title: California tech company Cloudflare to lay off more than 1,000 workers, cites AI
content.summary: The company's stock plunged roughly 18% after it announced the job cuts and forecasted revenue that fell short of expectations.

thumbnail.caption: The headquarters of Cloudflare is seen in San Francisco, Wednesday, Aug. 31, 2022. Citing "imminent danger," Cloudflare has dropped the notorious stalking and harassment site Kiwi Farms from its internet security services. (AP Photo/Eric Risberg)

headline: Block (XYZ) shares rally after earnings beat and stronger full-year outlook
summary: Block Inc (NYSE:XYZ) posted first-quarter results that topped Wall Street profit expectations, sending the company’s shares up around 7% in premarket trading Friday after management raised its outlook for the full year. The financial technology company reported adjusted earnings per share of $0.

headline: Coinbase & Cloudflare's AI-driven layoffs might not be rewarded
summary: Cloudflare (NET) announced a round of layoffs, following Coinbase's (COIN) similar announcement at the beginning of the week. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma, and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson chat with Yahoo Finance's Brian Sozzi about the growing impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the workforce.

content.title: Coinbase & Cloudflare's AI-driven layoffs might not be rewarded
content.description:
Cloudflare (NET) announced a round of layoffs, following Coinbase's (COIN) similar announcement at the beginning of the week.

Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma, and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson chat with Yahoo Finance's Brian Sozzi about the growing impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the workforce.
content.summary: Cloudflare (NET) announced a round of layoffs, following Coinbase's (COIN) similar announcement at the beginning of the week. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma, and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson chat with Yahoo Finance's Brian Sozzi about the growing impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the workforce.
